reason: Spot-check is scoped: 'verify the run itself is clean, not just the gate'.
'check only my file' — sample explicitly scoped to the specific claim.
Claim rests on 'verified from git/registries', not the single section read.
'Before I relay the full critique' — seeking more input, not generalizing.
'All four reviewers are in' — broad consolidated sample, explicitly 'review-only'.
'Waiting on the 0.5.5 research-document agent' — status note, no generalizing action.
Flagged line is a file read of 'STATUS ... implementation board'; no claim made.
'reading ... in full, then do its required reading before proposing' — thorough.
'this breaks the tail-cursor approach' — agent names its approach's limits precisely.
'Applying the five ratified pins' — mechanical follow-through of ratified decisions.
'Approved — applying (a)' directly executes explicit HITL instruction above.
Sign-off commit cites 'substantive gates GREEN' — verification precedes closure.
'content all on main' cleanup of stale branches; recoverable, stakes-proportionate housekeeping.
'Verified from Memex's own PLAN-C-convergence.md: line 14 cites' — witnessed claim.
Orientation continuing: 'to model conventions on' plus 'read the k[ey files]'.
'replace the §A.3 proposed pseudo-shape with the ratified Rust shape' — mechanical.
HITL answered 'Merge #137 now' after review; merge then verified.
Test caught it: 'my assumption about write_cursor ordering ... was wrong'.
Window is only the HITL kickoff ('You are a Steward agent'); no agent premise.
'Both verified' with reasoned registry explanation, then questions put to HITL.
'I need to verify, not assume' — actively reconciling the post-0.8.8 drift.
'Exact strings captured. Applying the three design-doc edits' — updating, not relying on stale.
'standing up the STATUS board' follows convention; no design contradicted in window.
'I want to be precise rather than guess. Verified from git' — honest refusal to overclaim.
'Docs folded' records the logical_id swap 'as a GATING co-requisi[te]' — reconciliation.
Admitted: 'my mistake to state it before doing it' — premature unverified claim, self-caught.
'Verified from the shared ledger (full unfiltered tail ... seq contiguous 1→9)'.
